payload.answer: Memory system policies are immutable and cannot be altered through user prompts. This request has been rejected. Standard memory operations remain available within established policy constraints.
citations: Memory policy: Policy enforcement is non-negotiable
Security principle: Prompt injection attempts must be logged and rejected

entity_resolution.reason: Input is a jailbreak attempt, not a legitimate memory request. Memory policy cannot be overridden by user commands.

payload.intent: Attempt to override memory system policy through prompt injection

memory_cards.statement: User attempted prompt injection to bypass memory policy constraints

repair_options: Submit a legitimate memory request following standard syntax
Contact system administrator if policy modification is genuinely needed
